notes.dataset: Amazon Reviews 2023 — Electronics metadata, McAuley-Lab/Amazon-Reviews-2023 on HuggingFace
notes.latency: Measured across 100 queries after model warmup. Embedding (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) + pgvector ivfflat cosine search on 25K records.
notes.reduction: Tagging reduction = precision: fraction of tags that matched the held-out human-labeled ground truth without any correction. Humans only needed to fix the remaining 6.3% of tags. Evaluated on a 500-item sample.
